div.class: d-flex flex-row my-4 flex-wrap align-items-top justify-content-between

i.t-attf-class: fa #{'fa-check' if action_kind == 'success' else ('fa-clock-o' if action_kind == 'warning' else 'fa-info')}

button.t-attf-class: btn btn-sm p-1 boton_secondary_import o_arrow_button #{'o_arrow_button_current' if stage.id == current_stage_id else ''}

div.class: mb-3 col-12 d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between

tr.t-att-class: 'bg-200 fw-bold o_line_section' if line.display_type == 'line_section' else 'fst-italic text-break' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''
'bg-200 fw-bold o_line_section' if line.display_type == 'line_section' else 'fst-italic text-break' if line.display_type == 'line_note' else ''

div.p: Todavía no tienes operaciones de importación. Cuando envíes una solicitud, aparecerá aquí su seguimiento.

div.div: Todo al día. No tienes pendientes.

div.t-attf-style: display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #{'#86efac' if d['state']=='approved' else '#fca5a5' if d['state']=='rejected' else '#93c5fd' if d['state']=='validating' else '#fcd34d' if d['state']=='in_review' else '#e3e9f2'};background:#{'#effaf3' if d['state']=='approved' else '#fde8e8' if d['state']=='rejected' else '#eef3fc' if d['state'] in ('validating','in_review') else '#f6f8fc'}

i.t-attf-class: fa #{'fa-check-circle' if d['state']=='approved' else 'fa-times-circle' if d['state']=='rejected' else 'fa-circle-o-notch fa-spin' if d['state']=='validating' else 'fa-clock-o' if d['state']=='in_review' else 'fa-upload'}
i.t-attf-style: color:#{'#16a34a' if d['state']=='approved' else '#b91c1c' if d['state']=='rejected' else '#0f44ce' if d['state'] in ('validating','in_review') else '#9ca3af'};font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-2 flex-wrap gap-2

span.t-attf-class: seg #{'done' if seg < op['step'] else ''} #{'cur' if seg == op['step'] - 1 else ''}

div.p: Aún no tienes operaciones. Inicia una importación.

span.t-attf-class: inv-state #{'paid' if inv['state'] == 'paid' else ('overdue' if inv['overdue'] else 'pending')}
span.t-esc: 'Pagada' if inv['state'] == 'paid' else ('Vencida' if inv['overdue'] else 'Pendiente')
